invalid_public_username:
Username must be 3-30 characters. Only letters, numbers, _ . - are allowed.

Examples: Cool_Player, Gigachad.2026, Pro-Gamer_99
duplicate_publicUsername: Username {username} is already taken. Think of another one!
duplicate_telegramId: You already have an account. If not, notifiy administration. They will take care of this issue!
